title: container_registry
description: One container image registry or repository — one record per AWS ECR repository, GCP Artifact Registry repository, or Azure Container Registry. Policies check scan-on-push, public exposure, and encryption.

provider.description: Cloud provider short name: aws, gcp, azure.

scan_on_push_enabled.description: Container images are scanned for vulnerabilities on push.

image_immutability_enabled.description: Image tags are immutable (cannot be overwritten).
